title: PPIP - Share data button presented after log out
scenario: Share data toggle state does not persist after logout and login with Poly credentials in App Settings > General > Account
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to App Settings.
3. Go to App Settings → General → Account.
4. If not already logged in, tap "Continue as Guest" during onboarding and note the state (ON/OFF) of the "Share data" toggle.
5. Log in with valid Poly credentials (e.g., Poly account email and password).
6. Observe that the "Share data" toggle disappears from App Settings → General → Account.
7. Log out of the Poly account from App Settings → General → Account.
8. After logout, navigate back to App Settings → General → Account.
9. Observe the "Share data" toggle and its state.
expected: After logging out, the "Share data" toggle should reappear in App Settings > General > Account, and its state (ON/OFF) should match the user's original choice made during onboarding (when tapping "Continue as Guest").
